title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node and browsers to interact with the Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models for chains, agents, RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama-cli (npm)
summary: Unofficial interactive CLI tool to chat, manage models, and monitor Ollama from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama (Kotlin friendly) with sync/async APIs and model management.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained .NET SDK for Ollama supporting chat, completion, and embeddings.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds AI autocomplete, summarization, and Q&A using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-embeddings
summary: Lightweight PyPI package exposing Ollama embeddings endpoint for numpy/Pandas workflows.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama’s HTTP API.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat component template that streams Ollama responses with markdown and code highlighting.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to spin up Ollama sidecar containers in CI pipelines for integration testing.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module that provisions GPU-enabled EC2 instances with Ollama pre-installed.

title: ollama-rfcs
summary: Public RFC repository where the Ollama team discusses upcoming features and accepts community proposals.
